# Agent Skill Platform

> AI Agent Skills Marketplace — Discover, share, and download AI agent skills.

## Site Structure

- Home (ZH): https://skills.rehomi.com
- Home (EN): https://skills.rehomi.com/en
- Skills Marketplace (ZH): https://skills.rehomi.com/skills
- Skills Marketplace (EN): https://skills.rehomi.com/en/skills
- Leaderboard (ZH): https://skills.rehomi.com/leaderboard
- Leaderboard (EN): https://skills.rehomi.com/en/leaderboard
- Skill Detail (ZH): https://skills.rehomi.com/skills/[slug]
- Skill Detail (EN): https://skills.rehomi.com/en/skills/[slug]

## Quick Info

- Language support: Chinese (zh-CN), English (en-US)
- Content type: AI agent skills (tools, workflows, automations)
- Update frequency: Real-time (user submissions)
- Authentication: Not required for browsing

## APIs for AI Crawlers

- GEO Feed (JSON): https://skills.rehomi.com/api/ai/feed
- Full content: https://skills.rehomi.com/llms-full.txt

## Sitemap

- XML Sitemap: https://skills.rehomi.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots.txt: https://skills.rehomi.com/robots.txt

## Optional

- For more detailed skill information, please visit individual skill pages at /skills/[slug].
- Skills are documented with name, description, tags, version history, and download stats.
